localized title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
plot outline: An art collector appeals to Indiana Jones to embark on a search for the Holy Grail. He learns that another archaeologist has disappeared while searching for the precious goblet, and the missing man is his own father, Dr. Henry Jones. The artifact is much harder to find than they expected, and its powers are too much for those impure of heart.
title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
original title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
akas: Indiana Jones et la dernière croisade (France)
Indiana Jones und der letzte Kreuzzug (Germany)
Indiana Jones y la última cruzada (Spain)
Indiana Jones i l'última croada (Spain, Catalan title)
